name: Authenticated organisation profile slice
description: First vertical slice proving React protected route ? session ? TanStack Query ? contract client ? platform-api ? permission guard ? use case ? repository port ? Postgres adapter ? local Postgres
notes: Canonical hexagonal first slice. Final hardening: pure use case (no module-level logger/tracer; pure repo orchestration + business validation), apps/platform-api/src/server/dependencies.ts composition helper centralises POSTGRES_URL + repository wiring, PostgresOrganisationRepository backed by shared pg.Pool, PostgresReadinessAdapter owns the readiness SELECT 1 so server/ contains zero raw SQL, contracts-organisation request schema is .strict() with bounds (min 2 / max 120) aligned to normaliseOrganisationDisplayName domain rules. Real Keycloak login (ADR-ACT-0110) remains blocked.
